modern_reader_context.market_surface_rule: Use social discovery, school/work pressure, gaming, creator culture, comic shop/community, and phone-native life without sounding like an ad for platforms.
modern_reader_context.audience_story_rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture.
modern_reader_context.genre_relevance_rule: Modern sports must include training data, clips, rankings, team chats, finance/time pressure, and physical cost without letting analytics replace the body.

catalyst.logline: A viral clip says the protagonist choked, but the coach notices the real story in one frame of footwork nobody else watched.

modern_reader_context.craft_directive: Fuse the genre engine with a contemporary reader-world entrypoint. Market=en_US; audience=gen_z. Use catalyst 'clip_review_wrong_body': A viral clip says the protagonist choked, but the coach notices the real story in one frame of footwork nobody else watched. Transmutation: Clip judgment becomes form correction. Market surface: Use social discovery, school/work pressure, gaming, creator culture, comic shop/community, and phone-native life without sounding like an ad for platforms. Audience rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture. Use concrete objects and social pressure on page one; do not name-drop trends.
